case_title: ANDY MARTINEZ GAONA JR. VS. DEEPAK GHANDI

docket_entries.description: CM-200 : NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE CASE (DOCUMENT STAMPED: "BY FAX") FILED BY DEFENDANT GHANDI, DEEPAK

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAONA JR., ANDY MARTINEZ ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GAONA JR., ANDY MARTINEZ AS TO DEFENDANT GHANDI, DEEPAK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
